name: Banjar
notes: LEAF STUB (not a modelled G2P target). Banjar (Austronesian). Added so the language resolves in the registry; the grapheme inventory is a placeholder read off the standard Latin orthography and has NOT been validated against the phonological literature -- NO phonology is claimed. Flesh out before scoring (ms.json / yua.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Hammarström, H., Forkel, R., Haspelmath, M. & Bank, S.
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
sources.notes: Classification and ISO/Glottolog identification only; the placeholder inventory is not sourced from this reference.

ancestors.notes: Malayo-Polynesian, the Austronesian branch containing every Austronesian language outside Formosa.

location.notes: Glottolog's computed centroid for the Banjar-Bukit Malay family — a summary of a whole clade's range, not a place anyone speaks.
